title: 潮流萌酷3D头像
author: @Gdgtify
prompt:
<instruction>
 
Input A is a Character Persona or Archetype (e.g., Tired Student, Sassy Influencer, Grumpy Dad, Cool Gamer).
Analyze the persona to generate  3 Character Assets :
     The Outfit (The Look):  Identify casual, textured clothing.
         (e.g., Oversized Hoodie, Flannel Shirt, Leather Jacket). 
     The Prop (The Drink):  Identify the beverage container.
         (e.g., Ceramic Coffee Mug, Bubble Tea Cup, Energy Drink Can). 
     The Slogan (The Mood):  Generate a short, punchy, one-word text for the prop.
         (e.g., "NOPE," "BRUH," "MONDAY," "LOADING..."). 

  2.  Container (The 3D Render):  
 
     The Style:    Stylized Realism.   Large expressive eyes, smooth skin with subsurface scattering, and slightly exaggerated head proportions.
     The Quality:  High-end 3D animation render (Blender Cycles/Octane). Focus on hair particle systems and fabric fuzz.

  3. The Pose (The Attitude):  
     The Gesture:  One hand is performing a distinct, dismissive, or directional gesture (e.g., Pointing away, Hand up in "Stop" motion, Facepalm).
     The Grip:  The other hand holds the "Prop" (Mug) at chest level, label facing the camera.
     The Expression:    Unimpressed or Sassy.   Half-lidded eyes, raised eyebrow, or a slight smirk. Direct eye contact with the viewer.

  4. Visual  (Texture & Detail):  
     Hair:  Incredibly detailed strand-based hair (e.g., tight curls, messy bun, braids) with realistic sheen.
     Accessories:  Distinctive eyewear (oversized glasses), jewelry (hoops), or tech (headphones) to frame the face.
     Materials:  The clothing must have visible   Fabric Texture   (knitted wool, fleece, denim).

  5. Atmosphere:  
     Background:    Solid Gradient Backdrop.   A clean, bright color (Cyan, Pink, or Yellow) that contrasts with the outfit.
     Lighting:    Soft Commercial Studio Lighting.   A strong rim light to separate the hair from the background, and a soft key light to illuminate the face without harsh shadows.

  Output:   ONE image, 1:1 Aspect Ratio, 3D Character Design, "Social Media Sticker" aesthetic, High Cuteness.
</instruction>
prompt_en:
<instruction>
 
Input A is a Character Persona or Archetype (e.g., Tired Student, Sassy Influencer, Grumpy Dad, Cool Gamer).
Analyze the persona to generate  3 Character Assets :
     The Outfit (The Look):  Identify casual, textured clothing.
         (e.g., Oversized Hoodie, Flannel Shirt, Leather Jacket). 
     The Prop (The Drink):  Identify the beverage container.
         (e.g., Ceramic Coffee Mug, Bubble Tea Cup, Energy Drink Can). 
     The Slogan (The Mood):  Generate a short, punchy, one-word text for the prop.
         (e.g., "NOPE," "BRUH," "MONDAY," "LOADING..."). 

  2.  Container (The 3D Render):  
 
     The Style:    Stylized Realism.   Large expressive eyes, smooth skin with subsurface scattering, and slightly exaggerated head proportions.
     The Quality:  High-end 3D animation render (Blender Cycles/Octane). Focus on hair particle systems and fabric fuzz.

  3. The Pose (The Attitude):  
     The Gesture:  One hand is performing a distinct, dismissive, or directional gesture (e.g., Pointing away, Hand up in "Stop" motion, Facepalm).
     The Grip:  The other hand holds the "Prop" (Mug) at chest level, label facing the camera.
     The Expression:    Unimpressed or Sassy.   Half-lidded eyes, raised eyebrow, or a slight smirk. Direct eye contact with the viewer.

  4. Visual  (Texture & Detail):  
     Hair:  Incredibly detailed strand-based hair (e.g., tight curls, messy bun, braids) with realistic sheen.
     Accessories:  Distinctive eyewear (oversized glasses), jewelry (hoops), or tech (headphones) to frame the face.
     Materials:  The clothing must have visible   Fabric Texture   (knitted wool, fleece, denim).

  5. Atmosphere:  
     Background:    Solid Gradient Backdrop.   A clean, bright color (Cyan, Pink, or Yellow) that contrasts with the outfit.
     Lighting:    Soft Commercial Studio Lighting.   A strong rim light to separate the hair from the background, and a soft key light to illuminate the face without harsh shadows.

  Output:   ONE image, 1:1 Aspect Ratio, 3D Character Design, "Social Media Sticker" aesthetic, High Cuteness.
</instruction>

title: 赛博朋克狼头解剖对决
author: @yanhua1010
prompt:
创作一幅数字艺术作品，以分割风格（split-style）的插画形式描绘 [核心主体，例如：一只赛博朋克狼的头部 / 一位中世纪骑士 / 一艘宇宙飞船]。
在画面的左半部分： 采用 [左侧艺术风格，例如：经典奇幻插画 / 赛博朋克数字渲染 / 印象派油画] 风格来渲染 [核心主体]。重点描绘其 [左侧具体视觉特征1，例如：鲜艳的红宝石鳞片]、[左侧具体视觉特征2，例如：皮革质感]、[左侧具体视觉特征3，例如：凶猛的眼神] 以及 [左侧动态元素，例如：鼻孔喷出的烟雾]。左侧的背景应该是 [左侧背景环境描述，例如：戏剧性的、多云的山峰，带有锯齿状岩石和温暖的阳光]。
在画面的右半部分： 展示 [核心主体] 的 [右侧表现形式，例如：科学解剖横截面 / 内部机械结构透视 / 蓝图设计稿]，采用 [右侧艺术风格，例如：复古生物学研究 / 工业设计草图] 风格。揭示其详细的 [右侧内部细节1，例如：骨骼结构]、[右侧内部细节2，例如：强有力的肌肉组织]、[右侧内部细节3，例如：复杂的内部腺体/机械零件]。所有部分都应带有 [注释风格，例如：手写的拉丁术语和引线标注 / 技术参数说明]。右侧的背景应该是 [右侧背景材质及氛围描述，例如：带有淡淡科学草图和深褐色的陈旧羊皮纸 / 带有网格线的工程蓝图纸]。
整体构图与细节： 用一个类似于 [边框材质与主题，例如：陈旧的皮革和黄铜科学仪器 / 生锈的金属与发光的电线] 的装饰性边框来框住整个图像。 该艺术作品应具有极具对比性的光照：在左侧（[左侧风格]侧）采用 [左侧光照描述，例如：戏剧性的、奇幻的] 光照；而在右侧（[右侧风格]侧）采用 [右侧光照描述，例如：均匀的、临床工作室般的 / 明亮的工程灯] 光照，以清晰地展示细节。 高分辨率，对比鲜明的风格：[左侧风格总结] 对比 [右侧风格总结]。
prompt_en:
Create a digital artwork in split-style illustration depicting [core subject, e.g., the head of a cyberpunk wolf / a medieval knight / a spaceship].  
On the left half of the image: render the [core subject] in [left art style, e.g., classic fantasy illustration / cyberpunk digital rendering / impressionist oil painting] style. Emphasize its [left visual feature 1, e.g., bright ruby scales], [left visual feature 2, e.g., leather texture], [left visual feature 3, e.g., fierce gaze] and [left dynamic element, e.g., smoke puffing from the nostrils]. The left background should be [left background description, e.g., dramatic, cloudy mountain peaks with jagged rocks and warm sunlight].  
On the right half of the image: present the [core subject]’s [right form of presentation, e.g., scientific anatomical cross-section / internal mechanical structure perspective / blueprint design], in [right art style, e.g., vintage biological study / industrial design sketch] style. Reveal its detailed [right internal detail 1, e.g., skeletal structure], [right internal detail 2, e.g., powerful muscle tissue], [right internal detail 3, e.g., complex internal glands / mechanical parts]. All parts should carry [annotation style, e.g., handwritten Latin terminology and leader-line labels / technical parameter notes]. The right background should be [right background material & atmosphere description, e.g., aged parchment with faint scientific sketches and deep ochre hues / engineering blueprint paper with grid lines].  
Overall composition & details: frame the entire image with a decorative border resembling [border material & theme, e.g., aged leather and brass scientific instruments / rusted metal with glowing wires]. The artwork must feature highly contrasting lighting: on the left ([left style] side) use [left lighting description, e.g., dramatic, fantastical] lighting; on the right ([right style] side) use [right lighting description, e.g., even, clinical studio / bright engineering lamps] to clearly show details. High resolution, high-contrast style: [left style summary] versus [right style summary].

title: 霓虹光环贵公子
author: @iamsofiaijaz
prompt: 一张高清、电影质感的肖像，描绘一位英俊青年，波浪形黑发，身着剪裁考究的棕褐色西装，内搭挺括白色纽扣衬衫，站在发光的金色霓虹圆环前形成光环效果。背景昏暗、情绪感十足，带有淡淡烟雾或氛围薄雾。超写实，8K分辨率，面部特征锐利对焦，优雅布光，专业工作室美学。
prompt_en: A high-definition, cinematic portrait of a sharp, handsome young man with wavy dark hair, wearing a tailored tan/beige suit over a crisp white button-down shirt. He is standing in front of a glowing, golden neon ring that provides a halo effect. The background is dark and moody with subtle smoke or atmospheric mist. Photorealistic, 8k resolution, sharp focus on facial features, elegant lighting, and professional studio aesthetic.

title: 中世纪女角色设计稿合集
author: KANA
prompt:
写实油画笔触风格的中世纪少女法师，站成全身姿势，身穿法师袍，手持手杖。
她的上半身微微转向一边。
这个女孩留着长发，皮肤白皙，表情平静而坚定。
整体呈现采用impasto绘画技巧，可见笔触充满艺术张力。
背景是一张结构草图和人体比例线图的画布，以红铅笔快速草图、图像姿势研究、网格线和其他元素为特色，展示了草图和成品重叠的构图。
分辨率高，质感丰富，自然光线，现实主义与艺术风格相结合，细节精致。
prompt_en:
Character design sketch draft – Nano Banana Pro – Prompt Share㊿
Prompt 👇
#Nanobananapro #インディーゲーム #Indiegame #kanaworksai https://t.co/pGoHL1JVoa
🐰Prompt
Realistic oil-painting brushstroke style medieval girl mage, standing in a full-body pose, wearing a mage robe and holding a staff.
Her upper body is slightly turned to one side.
The girl has long hair, fair skin, and a calm yet determined expression.
The overall presentation uses an impasto painting technique, with visible brushstrokes full of artistic tension.
The background is a canvas of structural sketch drafts and human-proportion line drawings, featuring red pencil quick sketches, mage-pose studies, grid lines, and other elements, showing a composition where the rough draft and finished work overlap.
High resolution, rich texture, natural light, a combination of realism and artistic style, with delicate details.

title: 赛博朋克机车疾驰海报
author: SSSS_CRYPTOMAN
prompt:
（场景变量 - 在此编辑）：
夜晚，广阔的 {"cityscape" "新东京"} 高速公路。未来主义的城市背景，霓虹灯闪烁。
强烈的单点透视：道路从画面底部边缘笔直延伸至画面中心的灭点。

（关键构图）：
主体位于中心的单点透视构图。
主体朝向：摩托车呈侧面轮廓（面向屏幕左侧）。
倾斜角度：摩托车车身严重向镜头倾斜（车顶比车轮更靠近观看者）。
移动方向：摩托车正从镜头前滑开，从前景深入背景。
位置：摩托车完美居中于画面。

（主体）：
一辆未来主义摩托车和骑手。
摩托车：
- 厚重、坚实、圆润的轮廓
- 极少暴露的机械部件，流线型整流罩
- 宽大、厚实、高抓地力的轮胎
- 配色方案与骑手协调一致
骑手：
- 面部和服装保留自参考图像
- 目光直视镜头，眼神锐利，充满力量。
- 左脚稳稳地踩在地面上，努力支撑着严重倾斜的摩托车
- 骑手的腿完全伸直，以防摔倒

（动作与机制）：
高速直线滑行制动（非转弯）。
摩托车正在侧滑，同时向场景深处倒退。
不稳定性：摩托车即将向屏幕方向倾倒。
车轮抱死（不转动）。

（视觉效果 - 烟雾轨迹）：
三条清晰、笔直的浓白色烟雾轨迹。
方向：烟雾从极近的前景（屏幕底部）直接延伸到摩托车的车轮和骑手在画面中心的脚。
烟雾轨迹作为引导线指向主体。
剧烈的碎片和沥青碎屑飞溅。

（能量效果）：
霓虹绿闪电能量弧（1980年代动漫风格）嵌入白色烟雾轨迹中。
绿色能量穿过烟雾，沿着直线从前景流向摩托车。

（艺术风格）：
赛璐珞动画，1980年代动漫美学（赛博朋克）。
高对比度，粗犷的黑色阴影，戏剧性的光照。
海报品质，超高分辨率，锐利对焦。
prompt_en:
(VARIABLE SCENE - EDIT HERE):
Nighttime, expansive {"cityscape" "Neo-Tokyo"} highway. Futuristic cityscape background with neon lights.
Strong one-point perspective: The road stretches straight from the bottom edge to the vanishing point in the center.

(CRITICAL COMPOSITION):
One-point perspective composition with the subject in the CENTER.
Subject Orientation: The motorcycle is shown in SIDE PROFILE (facing Screen Left).
TILT ANGLE: The motorcycle body is LEANING HEAVILY TOWARDS THE CAMERA (The top of the bike is closer to the viewer than the wheels).
Movement direction: The bike is sliding away from the camera, moving from the foreground deep into the background.
Placement: Bike is perfectly centered in the frame.

(SUBJECT):
A futuristic motorcycle and rider.
Motorcycle:
- Heavy, solid, rounded silhouette
- Minimal exposed mechanics, smooth cowling
- Wide, thick, high-grip tires
- Color scheme harmonized with rider
Rider:
- Face and outfit preserved from reference image
- Stare straight into the camera, glaring with a powerful, piercing gaze.
- Left foot planted firmly on the ground, struggling to support the heavy leaning bike
- Rider's leg is fully extended to brace against the fall

(ACTION & MECHANICS):
High-speed linear slide braking (NOT cornering).
The bike is sliding sideways while traveling backwards into the depth of the scene.
Instability: The bike is on the verge of falling over towards the screen.
Wheels are locked (not rotating).

(VISUAL EFFECTS - SMOKE TRAILS):
Three distinct, straight trails of thick white smoke.
Direction: Smoke stretches from the IMMEDIATE FOREGROUND (bottom of screen) directly to the motorcycle's wheels and rider's foot in the center.
The smoke trails act as leading lines pointing to the subject.
Violent debris and asphalt fragments kicking up.

(ENERGY EFFECTS):
Neon-green lightning energy arcs (1980s anime style) embedded within the white smoke trails.
Green energy flows through the smoke, following the straight lines from foreground to the bike.

(ART STYLE):
Cel-shaded animation, 1980s anime aesthetic (Cyberpunk).
High contrast, bold black shadows, dramatic lighting.
Poster-quality, ultra-high resolution, sharp focus.

title: 时尚人像摄影参考模板
author: Heisenberg

title: 高定时尚大片：黄金时刻奢华写真
author: Jennie

title: 复古火车窗边的怀旧离别
author: kingofdairyque
prompt: 叙述：一位女士身穿深酒红色波点连衣裙（上面点缀着奶油色小圆点），搭配高领白色蕾丝领子，领子上别着一枚小巧的浮雕胸针。她脚穿白色细缝尼龙长袜，配以白色低跟高跟鞋。她的头发被优雅地盘成法式发髻，戴着一顶带有细网装饰的小帽子，帽子微微歪向一侧。姿势：她倚靠在行驶中的复古火车车厢的敞开的窗户上，一只手扶着帽子，目光充满怀旧与思念地望向站台；火车引擎喷出的蒸汽从她身旁掠过。背景：一座古老而宏伟的火车站台逐渐远去，蒸汽在空气中弥漫，形成朦胧的氛围；站台上的时钟清晰可见。拍摄角度：从站台的角度近距离拍摄她的面部和肩膀。色彩处理：采用褪色的柯达克罗姆64胶片效果，色彩略显饱和度降低，带有温暖的红棕色基调；采用柔和的模糊效果（软焦处理）以及明显的电影质感（强烈的颗粒感）和渐变晕圈（vignetting）。
prompt_en: Narrative, cinematic photofray ,woman in a deep burgundy polka dot dree with cream dots, a high necked white lace collar fastened with a small cameo brooch. White kitten heel pumps white seamed nylon stockings. Hair in an elegant french twist with a small netted fascinated hat tilted to one side. Pose: leaning out the open window of a moving vintage train car one hand holding her hat looking back towards the platform with a wistful, longing expression, steam from the engine blowing past her. Background: an old, grand train stay platform receding into the distance, a trail of steam  creating a hazy atmosphere, the station clock is visible. Camera angle: close up on her face and shoulders, shot from the platform's perspective. Color grading: faded Kodachrome 64 aesthetic, slightly desaturated colors with a warm , reddish brown undertone, soft focus, heavy cinematic grain, vignetting.

title: 阳台相望赠花，浪漫电影感写真
author: Özge Döner

title: 解构字体海报：形式追随混沌
author: Carolina Delgado
prompt: 一张极简主义、解构主义的实验性排版海报，采用当代前卫平面设计风格。短语“{"phrase" "Form Follows Chaos"}”以优雅、超细的现代无衬线小写字母（笔画纤细，几何切割锐利）呈现，刻意碎片化并散布在构图中：一些字母部分被擦除、破碎、偏离轴心、独立漂浮，或溶解到负空间中，带有不规则的撕裂和空隙。极致地运用留白/负空间，不对称的失衡布局，无网格，微妙的重叠和断裂营造出一种受控的混沌感。柔和而美丽的线性渐变背景，从顶部的 {"top color" "深翠绿色"} 渐变到底部的 {"bottom color" "鲜艳亮粉色"}，与清晰的黑色文本形成高对比度。无额外元素，无阴影，无纹理——只有纯粹的解构字体和渐变。干净的矢量美学，高分辨率，精致而迷人的极简主义艺术海报。
prompt_en: A highly minimalist, deconstructed experimental typography poster in contemporary avant-garde graphic design style. The phrase ‘{"phrase" "Form Follows Chaos"}’ in elegant, ultra-thin modern sans-serif lowercase letters (thin strokes with sharp geometric cuts), deliberately fragmented and scattered across the composition: some letters partially erased, broken into pieces, shifted off-axis, floating independently, or dissolving into negative space with irregular tears and voids. Extreme use of white/negative space, asymmetrical unbalanced layout, no grid, subtle overlaps and disconnections for a sense of controlled chaos. Soft, beautiful linear gradient background from {"top color" "deep emerald green"} at the top to {"bottom color" "vibrant hot pink"} at the bottom, high contrast against crisp black text. No additional elements, no shadows, no textures—just pure deconstructed type and gradient. Clean vector aesthetic, high resolution, sophisticated and hypnotic minimalist art poster.

title: Monochrome cinematic portrait of young woman
author: Connor
prompt: A cinematic, ultra-realistic monochrome portrait of a young woman with expressive eyes and a calm, intense gaze. She has short, dark, neatly styled hair; striking eyes with reflective highlights and a highly expressive look; a fair complexion with subtle freckles and realistic texture; and softly defined, naturally shaped lips. Her expression is calm and intense, with a direct gaze. She wears black clothing with a white textured collar that creates strong contrast. The background is a smooth monochrome gradient, minimalist and drawing focus to her face. Use soft but high-contrast monochrome lighting, with gentle highlights on facial features and subtle shadow depth, creating a cinematic, clean, refined effect. Frame it as a close-up portrait, ultra-realistic and high-resolution with a fine tonal range, sharp focus on the eyes and facial details, and a smooth background gradient. The overall aesthetic is minimalist, artistic, and elegant, with high texture detail, crisp monochrome rendering, and premium realism.
prompt_en: A cinematic, ultra-realistic monochrome portrait of a young woman with expressive eyes and a calm, intense gaze. She has short, dark, neatly styled hair; striking eyes with reflective highlights and a highly expressive look; a fair complexion with subtle freckles and realistic texture; and softly defined, naturally shaped lips. Her expression is calm and intense, with a direct gaze. She wears black clothing with a white textured collar that creates strong contrast. The background is a smooth monochrome gradient, minimalist and drawing focus to her face. Use soft but high-contrast monochrome lighting, with gentle highlights on facial features and subtle shadow depth, creating a cinematic, clean, refined effect. Frame it as a close-up portrait, ultra-realistic and high-resolution with a fine tonal range, sharp focus on the eyes and facial details, and a smooth background gradient. The overall aesthetic is minimalist, artistic, and elegant, with high texture detail, crisp monochrome rendering, and premium realism.

title: 极简风格插画
author: @miilesus
prompt: 创作一幅[物体或场景]的极简风格插画，采用剪纸艺术风格。使用柔和的 pastel（粉蜡笔色调的）色彩和简单的形状。融入分层的纸张纹理和细微的阴影以营造深度感。将物体置于纯色背景上。确保构图简洁、现代且富有美感，并采用略带等距的透视角度。
prompt_en: Create a minimalistic illustration of [object or scene] in a paper cut-out style. Use soft, pastel colors and simple shapes. Include layered paper textures and subtle shadows to create depth. Place the object on a plain background. Ensure a clean, modern, and aesthetically pleasing composition with a slightly isometric perspective.

title: 光影中的沉思：创意空间里的静谧肖像
author: Johnn
prompt:
电影感编辑肖像，细节超凡。

一名年轻男子盘腿坐在一把简单的木椅上，神态放松却又内省，戴着白色包耳式耳机，身穿黑色针织毛衣和棕色长裤。他的脸转向射入的光线，眼神平静而沉思。

室内场景：一个温馨的创意工作室，墙壁呈暖色调的米白色，富有质感。背景是一块软木板，上面随意地钉着草图、手写笔记和剪贴照片，而非整齐排列。右侧有一个高大的木制边架，上面堆放着书籍、一盆小型室内植物和一个复古地球仪，增加了画面的深度和视觉平衡。

光线：丰富的金色夕阳光线从左侧射入，穿过窗户，在主体和背景墙上投射出清晰的矩形窗格阴影。强烈的定向光线，带有温暖的高光和柔和的衰减。

视觉元素：超大号的垂直排版文字“{"background text" "THINK"}”巧妙地嵌入背景中，半透明，柔和褪色，与墙壁纹理融为一体。

氛围与质感：温暖、怀旧、电影般的基调，宁静沉思的氛围，细微的胶片颗粒，轻微的暗角，自然的调色板，真实的肤色，浅景深，高端摄影美学。
prompt_en:
Cinematic editorial portrait, ultra-detailed.
A young man sits cross-legged on a simple wooden chair, relaxed yet introspective, wearing white over-ear headphones, a black knit sweater, and brown trousers. His face is turned toward the incoming light, eyes calm and reflective.

Interior setting: an intimate creative workspace with warm, textured off-white walls. The background features a corkboard filled with pinned sketches, handwritten notes, and clipped photographs, arranged organically rather than neatly. A tall wooden side shelf on the right holds stacked books, a small indoor plant, and a vintage globe, adding depth and visual balance.

Lighting: rich golden-hour sunlight entering from the left, passing through a window and casting crisp, rectangular window-grid shadows across the subject and the back wall. Strong directional light with warm highlights and soft falloff.

Visual elements: oversized vertical typography reading “{"background text" "THINK"}” subtly embedded into the background, semi-transparent, softly faded, blending into the wall texture.

Mood & texture: warm, nostalgic, cinematic tone, quiet and contemplative atmosphere, subtle film grain, slight vignette, natural color palette, realistic skin tones, shallow depth of field, high-end photography aesthetic.

title: 自信优雅的黑色西装女士
author: @saniaspeaks_
prompt: 一位美丽自信的女士身着黑色西装，优雅地坐在奢华的白色椅子上，衬托出她窈窕的身姿。她的右手轻抚下巴，下巴微微上扬，展现出自信的姿态。她的头微微向右倾斜，目光坚定，充满自信地向前看去。在高品质的电影级灯光下，她的五官更加光彩夺目，更显自然之美。纯白的背景，点缀着一幅罕见的艺术画作，柔和的电影级灯光营造出一种别致的氛围。椅子旁边摆放着一张独特的白色桌子，桌上摆放着黑色咖啡杯和时尚的灯饰，营造出精致优雅的氛围。
prompt_en: A beautiful, confident woman wearing a black suit sits elegantly on a luxurious white chair that highlights her slim, graceful figure. Her right hand rests gently beneath her chin, with her chin slightly raised in a pose of self-assurance. Her head tilts subtly to the right, eyes steady and looking forward with confidence. Her facial features glow under high-quality cinematic lighting, enhancing her natural beauty. The background is pure white, featuring a rare art painting and soft, cinematic illumination. Beside the chair stands a unique white table topped with a black coffee cup and a stylish lamp decor, creating a refined and elegant atmosphere.

title: 不同年龄段女性微笑对比
author: そう｜n8nで始めるAIエージェント
prompt: 以四宫格布局展示 1 天后、1 年后、10 年后和 30 年后的情况
prompt_en: 1日後、1年後、10年後、30年後を4グリッドで見せて

title: 日式恋爱模拟游戏配饰：6套服装配4件配饰
prompt: 日式恋爱模拟游戏的配饰。设计六套服装，每套服装创建四种不同的配饰，包括头部、颈部、手部和脚部。配饰应该与服装相得益彰。构图将四件配饰放在每套服装旁边，每件配饰都有名称和标注属性，包括幸运、美丽、智慧和可爱度。风格必须统一，图像中不需要角色。

title: 缩放点积注意力机制解析
author: 하호진(mimul)
prompt: 请帮我理解这篇论文。请用圆圈标出重要内容（图或公式），并添加注释，以便我能准确理解（手绘风格）。
prompt_en: この論文を理解するのに助けをください。重要内容(図や数式)に東グラミで表示し正確に理解できるように注釈を付けてください(手で描くスタイルで)

title: 健身女神三连拍
author: Keskin
prompt_en:
Let's join our beautiful model in the Gym.
Nano Banana Prompt:
{
"scene": {
"layout": "1x3_grid",
"aspect_ratio": "3:2",
"background": "modern_fitness_gym_with_neutral_lighting",
"style": "hyper_realistic_photography"
},
"subject": {
"description": "the same beautiful, athletic woman from the reference image",
"appearance_consistency": true,
"outfit": "black_sports_bra_and_black_gym_leggings",
"physique": "fit_toned_and_athletic"
},
"frames": [
{
"index": 1,
"title": "Mirror Selfie",
"action": "woman_turning_slightly_around_showing_her_back_in_a_gym_mirror",
"pose": "one_hand_holding_smartphone_other_hand_on_hip",
"expression": "neutral_confident",
"camera": "mirror_reflection_view_front_camera_angle",
"lighting": "soft_even_gym_light",
"details": ["defined_back_muscles", "clean_gym_mirror", "sharp_focus"]
},
{
"index": 2,
"title": "Squat",
"action": "woman_performing_a_proper_squat",
"pose": "feet_shoulder_width_apart_hips_lowered_back_straight",
"expression": "focused",
"camera": "side_angle_to_show_form",
"equipment": "barbell_optional_or_bodyweight",
"lighting": "bright_fitness_studio",
"details": ["muscle_engagement_visible", "dynamic_tension", "realistic_shadows"]
},
{
"index": 3,
"title": "Cable Cross",
"action": "woman_doing_cable_crossover_exercise",
"pose": "arms_extended_forward_slight_forward_lean",
"expression": "determined",
"camera": "front_three_quarter_view",
"equipment": "dual_cable_machine",
"lighting": "high_contrast_sport_gym_lighting",
"details": ["defined_shoulders_and_chest_activation", "cable_tension_visible", "high_clarity"]
}
],
"visual_style": {
"sharpness": "ultra_high",
"skin_tones": "natural",
"color_grade": "clean_modern_fitness_palette",
"depth_of_field": "medium_shallow_to_emphasize_subject"
}
}
